name: Accordion
searchText: accordion divide content into collapsible sections @mantine/core /core/accordion chevron chevroniconsize chevronposition chevronsize defaultvalue disablechevronrotation keepmounted loop multiple onchange order radius transitionduration value value chevron children disabled icon

props.name: chevronIconSize
props.description: Size of the default chevron icon. Ignored when chevron prop is set. Use chevronSize instead when using custom chevron.

props.name: chevronPosition
props.description: Position of the chevron relative to the item label

props.name: chevronSize
props.description: Size of the chevron icon container

props.name: disableChevronRotation
props.description: If set, chevron rotation is disabled

props.name: keepMounted
props.description: If set to false, panels are unmounted when collapsed. By default, panels stay mounted when collapsed.

props.name: loop
props.description: If set, arrow keys loop through items (first to last and last to first)

props.name: multiple
props.description: If set, multiple items can be opened at the same time

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called when value changes, payload type depends on multiple prop

props.name: order
props.description: Sets heading level (h2-h6) for Accordion.Control elements to meet WAI-ARIA requirements. Has no visual effect.

props.name: radius
props.description: Key of theme.radius or any valid CSS value to set border-radius. Numbers are converted to rem.

props.name: value
props.description: Value that is used to manage the accordion state

props.name: icon
props.description: Icon displayed next to the label
